classes.FORMAL_DEFINITION: Definition internal to the declared formal language.
classes.PROVED_THEOREM: Proved in the recorded formal encoding under its listed assumptions.
classes.CONDITIONAL_THEOREM: Conclusion depends on explicit assumptions or implementation invariants.
classes.VALIDATOR_SOUNDNESS_CLAIM: Soundness claim bounded to the declared supported fragment.
classes.MECHANIZED_LEAN: Lean 4 source builds for the encoded proposition.
classes.MECHANIZED_COQ: Coq source builds for the encoded proposition.
classes.DUAL_BACKEND_PARITY_VERIFIED: Structural release-record parity verified; not proof-term identity.
classes.MODEL_INTERPRETATION: Interpretation in a finite or toy model.
classes.EMPIRICAL_CLAIM: Requires observable, measurement protocol, uncertainty, and data.
classes.NON_CLAIM: Explicitly excluded interpretation or governance statement.

range_rules.reason: Independent-witness sufficiency is conditional on recorded premises.
Accepted-fragment checker soundness depends on proved rule lemmas and implementation invariants.
Conservative-extension non-interference depends on handler isolation and no baseline override.

global_nonclaims: proof-term identity between Lean and Coq
